CurrentIssues.ID: LongParameterList:Cartesian3DView.kt$Cartesian3DView$( point3D: FloatArray, screenWidth: Float, screenHeight: Float, centerX: Float, centerY: Float, distance: Float = 500f, )
MaxLineLength:ComposeInViewActivity.kt$// A reta tangente geométrica tradicional é a reta vertical x = cx + r (onde x=1 no círculo unitário)
